prompt: Create a polished cyberpunk anime cafe advertisement scene featuring Hoshi-Sakura Cafe. The image is a vertical 4:5 cinematic illustration inside a futuristic high-rise cafe at night, looking out through huge glass windows onto a glowing neon city skyline with tall towers, blue-purple twilight, and pink cherry blossoms outside. In the foreground, an elegant silver-white-haired anime cyborg girl with very long flowing hair sits at a wooden table, holding a branded takeaway coffee cup near her face; her face is intentionally obscured by a flat square censor block. She has luminous futuristic headphones/ear modules with circular cyan and violet lights, transparent holographic hair strands, and intricate chrome robotic arms and shoulders with glowing blue energy cores and small magenta highlights. The mood is dreamy, luxurious, soft, and atmospheric, with reflections on glass, glossy metal, bokeh lights, and volumetric neon glow. Include exactly 5 prominent branded cafe objects/signage elements: 1) a large circular window sign on the left with an anime portrait logo, Japanese text "星桜機", and the English words "HOSHI-SAKURA CAFE"; 2) a matte paper shopping bag on the table with rope handles, cherry blossom graphics, the same circular portrait logo, Japanese text "星桜機", and "HOSHI-SAKURA CAFE"; 3) a takeaway coffee cup in the girl's hand with the same circular portrait logo and the same cafe name; 4) a small transparent holographic tabletop menu sign glowing cyan and purple, labeled "MENU" and listing exactly 5 items: "星桜ラテ", "月光モカ", "サイバー抹茶", "星雲スムージー", "抹茶フュージョン"; 5) a translucent futuristic dessert tray with one small pastel purple pastry or bun glowing with faint blue circuit-like patterns. Use a cohesive logo style showing a circular portrait of the same silver-haired cyborg girl with cherry blossom motifs. Color palette: icy cyan, violet, lavender, magenta, soft pink cherry blossom, dark navy. Lighting should be high-detail anime realism with sharp product-ad composition, luminous holograms, reflective tabletop, shallow depth of field, no extra people, no watermark, no unrelated text, and no additional menu items.
